original_image_tags: Pink FBI teletype paper with punched holes at top center. Text is typed in black ink. Handwritten annotations in blue and black ink. Red ink stamps: "RECORDED AUG 15 1947" and "INDEXED 1". Names visible in distribution list stamp: Mr. Tolson, Mr. E. A. Tamm, Mr. Clegg, Mr. Ladd, Mr. Nichols, Mr. Rosen, Mr. Tracy, Mr. Egan, Mr. Gurnea, Mr. Harbo, Mr. Mahr, Mr. Pennington.

elements.description: Multiple stamps and handwritten annotations on a pink typed document. Includes a faded 'FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION' stamp, 'AUG 1 4 1947' stamp, 'RECORDED INDEXED' stamp with '13' and 'AUG 15 1947', '3 AUG 26 1947' stamp, and a 'G. I. R. EX-61' stamp. Various handwritten initials and notes in pencil and pen are scattered across the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of stamps and annotations on a pink document, but B lists specific stamp text strings (e.g., 'AUG 1 4 1947', 'G. I. R. EX-61') and A lists different stamp text and distribution names, creating a contradiction on the specific quoted text inside the visual stamps.
